item.title: Week notes: March 16–20
item.description: 222 commits, 35 repos, two nodes talking to each other, a benchmark harness, a website for humans and agents, a Prolog ontology, and a synth stripped to a heartbeat.

item.title: Imago: Building a Terminal Workflow for Conversational Writing
item.description: I built a TUI that interviews me and writes blog posts. Two phases — conversational interview, then section-by-section editing — running entirely on local LLMs.

item.title: Compiled musicbox to WebAssembly — generative ambient audio now runs in the br...
item.description: Compiled musicbox to WebAssembly — generative ambient audio now runs in the browser. Each session sounds different. Not everyone who enjoys ambient drones knows how to `cargo run`, so now you don't have to. Enjoy\! [musicbox.genlevel.com](https://musicbox.genlevel.com)

item.title: Week notes: March 9–15
item.description: 37 years writing software, and agents changed what I attempt. This week: a syndication pipeline, a browser synth, five websites, and platform-wide hardening.

item.title: Building a personal syndication pipeline in Go
item.description: I wanted a simple publishing workflow: write a post, review it, publish to my own site, and syndicate copies to Bluesky and Mastodon. No CMS, no third-party service, just a CLI tool backed by event sourcing and a static site.
